synthetic_motiondex_golden.node-export.j.note: ADDED 2026-07-18 (MOTIONDEX-BUILD-2026-07-17 §5) — MotionDex's first code-gated fixture + the COMMITTED synthetic input for its 'compute() ≡ committed export' equivalence leg (env.equiv.motiondex, dex-tests.js CASES). The input is a deterministic, seeded synthetic Polar Sensor Logger ACC stream (MOTIONDSP.genSyntheticACC — closed-form supine/quiet-breathing waveform, no recording of any person, no device identifier, no Date.now/RNG) so re-running the generator reproduces it byte-for-byte and inputHashes stay stable. It is COMMITTED (tracked by name in .gitignore), so the equiv diff RUNS IN CI with no corpus — a committed synthetic twin beats a gitignored real one (FIXTURE-VERIFICATION-GATE lesson). The CASE re-runs MOTIONDSP.buildNodeExport(compute({acc,chestAcc:same})); regenerate the input + this golden together whenever the export shape changes.
